{{Quote|Stay, and accept the death you know you deserve!|Tolokai, to Mon Mothma|<ref name="X-Wing: Solo Command">''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]''</ref>}}
'''Tolokai''' was a [[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]] aide to [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] during the early [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

==Biography==
Tolokai, however, was not simply an aide; he was also a personal [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguard]] to Mon Mothma. Using his cones, he could detect if somebody was preparing to attack Mothma, granting him a high amount of trust from the [[Chief Councilor]]. [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]] chose Tolokai as a participant in his [[Project Funeral]]. Tolokai intended to kill Mothma with a [[Vibroblade/Legends|vibroblade]]. However, [[Malan Tugrina]], another of Chief Mothma's aides, took the blade instead, and managed to throw himself and Tolokai down some stairs. Tolokai's neck was broken in the fall, and the councilor survived the attack.
